title: MikroTik LHGmount - Simple metallic mount for LHG series products
description: LHGmount is low cost, metallic, easily adjustable holder for all LHG series units, including larger LHG XL models. The unit is installed with 4 screws included in the package. The holder can be mounted on a pipe with a maximum diameter of 58mm
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Designed for mast diameter [mm] 20 up to 58 Width [mm] 95 Height [mm] 88 Depth [mm] 108
